title: Prehistorica
description: Make Dinosaurs, discover ruins, and more
body:
Unearth the past. Create the future.

Prehistorica brings prehistoric life to Minecraft with a focus on exploration, discovery, and dinosaur creation. Venture into the wild to find ancient structures, fossils, and DNA samples. With the right tools and research, you can bring two incredible dinosaurs back to life: the swift Gallimimus and the fearsome Baryonyx.

Explore ruined labs, forgotten temples, and mysterious dig sites as you piece together the secrets of a lost age. Use fossil DNA to craft dino eggs, hatch them, and watch your prehistoric creatures roam the world once more!
